pi_items.source: CSV data from setup_task.sh lines 15-22 (8 contestants in rows 2-9 of spreadsheet)

privileged_info_summary: The chili cook-off scorer task uses synthetic data hardcoded in the setup script with 8 contestants and 4 judges. Judges 1-2 rated on a 1-10 scale while Judges 3-4 used a 1-5 scale requiring normalization by multiplying by 2. Two entries have missing judge scores: Three Bean is missing Judge2, and Sweet & Savory is missing Judge4. The expected final rankings after normalization are: Cincinnati Style (9.75), Three Bean (9.67), Spicy Red (8.75), Green Chile (7.75), Smoky Blues (7.25), Sweet & Savory (7.0), Texas Heat (6.75), White Chili (5.25). The prize pool is $500 distributed as: Rank 1=$250 (50%), Rank 2=$150 (30%), Rank 3=$100 (20%), Ranks 4-8=$0.
